Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."DocDate", T0."CardName", T0."Address", T0."Filler" AS "FromWarehouse", T0."Comments", T0."GroupNum" AS "PriceListNum", T1."ListName" AS "PriceList", T2."SlpName", T0."ObjType" FROM "OWTQ" T0 LEFT JOIN "OPLN" T1 ON T0."GroupNum" = T1."ListNum" LEFT JOIN "OSLP" T2 ON T0."SlpCode" = T2."SlpCode" WHERE T0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", T0."WhsCode", T0."unitMsr", T0."Quantity" FROM "WTQ1" T0 WHERE T0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@}

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Fra lager', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Von Lager', True, 'From warehouse' //Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Til lager', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bis Lager', True, 'To Whse' //Default English )
if{@PriceListNumber} <> -1 then {@PriceListDescription} Else switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Sidste indkøbspris', True, 'Last Purchase Price' //Default English )
